_array.Text: Best be a little cautious here.
Don't blame you in the least.
Fear is for the living and the dead...
Don't say I didn't warn ya!
Such courage in the face of Fear!
Who am I trying to impress...?
I can intensify the Vow of Rivals now...
More to the Vow of Rivals now...
The Vow of Rivals is at full potential now...
{#Emph}In shadow, I serve; to shadow, I return.
What would Night have me do?
What is the will of Night?
May need to take new Vows...
If I'm to serve the Night, I would know her will...
I can deepen my connection with the Night...
{#Emph}In shadow, I serve; to shadow, I return.
